component.name: Rubric
component.summary: Worship service planning with RCL integration

description.p: Rubric is a GNOME-native worship service planning tool for United Church of Canada ministry. Plan service orders, look up lectionary readings, find hymns from Voices United, More Voices, and Let Us Sing, fetch Bible passages, and export polished bulletins to LaTeX and PDF.

ul.li: Revised Common Lectionary readings, liturgical colour, and hymn suggestions for any Sunday
Hymn lookup and suggestions from Voices United, More Voices, and Let Us Sing
Bible passage viewer using the World English Bible (public domain)
LaTeX export with two-column layout, scripture environment, and Junicode font
Snippets library with reusable liturgical texts

description.p: Lectionary year tracker, per-Proper hymn suggestions, inline Hymnary preview, welcome dialog, and app renamed to Rubric.
Scripture layout improvements, PDF compile button, toast notifications, menu reorganisation.
